note: The career timeline. Each role gets its own page at role.html?role=<slug>. Credentials arrays are staged empty — drop in { label, url } once the live credential links are ready and they render automatically.

roles.title: Founder / Digital Program Operator
roles.summary: Built and runs the digital platform behind a nonprofit cultural, educational, and community-development initiative — the sites, the socials, the campaigns, the movement.
bullets: Built and managed the digital platforms for a nonprofit cultural, educational, and community-development initiative.
Created outreach content supporting youth engagement, creative programming, civic leadership, and public communication.
Managed website, social media, digital identity, content, and audience-engagement workflows.
Developed public-facing messaging for campaigns, community initiatives, recognition materials, and stakeholder communication.
Organized digital assets, program information, contact lists, and outreach materials.
Used media, storytelling, and digital platforms to drive community engagement and public visibility.

roles.title: Owner-Operator
roles.summary: Owns and operates a parts-licensed automotive dealership organized in Acworth, Georgia — and turned the business into a story, producing a mini web series based on it.
bullets: Founded and organized Whip Equipped LLC as a parts-licensed automotive dealership out of Acworth, Georgia in 2024.
Runs day-to-day operations — sourcing, sales, parts licensing, and compliance.
Producing a mini web series built around the dealership, scored by the McCluster catalogue ("Dealer Plates").
Bridges the business and the brand: retail operations on one side, media production on the other.

roles.title: Digital Marketing & Outreach Platform Manager
roles.summary: Ran the digital front for a community organization — social channels, outreach workflows, weekly live broadcasts, and the media production behind them.
bullets: Managed digital platforms used for outreach, marketing, customer communication, and public engagement.
Created and maintained social media workflows across Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn, and other channels.
Supported community outreach by organizing content, announcements, event updates, and public-facing messages.
Managed customer and community contact workflows for follow-up, program updates, and general communication.
Coordinated live streaming, recording, and media production support for public programming and weekly broadcasts.
Improved digital visibility, audience engagement, and communication between the organization and the community.
Supported staff with platform access, content posting, technical issues, and digital workflow needs.
Moved traditional outreach and communication processes into modern digital systems.

roles.title: Infrastructure Engineer
roles.summary: Kept enterprise technology systems reliable under business, technical, and trading-floor pressure.
bullets: Supported enterprise technology systems used by business, technical, and operations teams.
Troubleshot access, connectivity, platform, and system issues affecting users.
Assisted with documentation, system coordination, and workflow improvement.
Worked with cross-functional teams to support reliable digital operations.
Built experience supporting business systems that demanded strong communication, organization, and technical follow-through.

roles.title: Desktop Support / IT Support Technician
roles.summary: The tutorial levels — customer-facing technical support where every user got saved and every ticket got closed.
bullets: Provided customer-facing technical support for hardware, software, desktop, laptop, and business-application issues.
Helped users with login problems, platform access, software issues, device troubleshooting, and connectivity.
Communicated technical information clearly to non-technical users.
Supported technology rollouts, system setup, workstation support, and user training.
Built a foundation in customer service, troubleshooting, documentation, and user support.

roles.title: Marketing Director
roles.summary: The first job — at fourteen, marketing director of a thrift shop the family homeschool network took over and ran together. The origin of everything that followed.
bullets: Served as marketing director at age fourteen — the first role on the record.
Worked the shop alongside family and the homeschool network that took the store over and ran it.
Learned retail, merchandising, and promotion from the ground up.
Where the through-line started: build the platform, tell the story, move the product.

certifications.label: DCI Academy — Information Technology Technical Program
